system.damage: jaws like a cave d12+7 (_reach_, _forceful_, _messy_, 3 piercing), thrashing coils d12+5 (_close_, _area_, _forceful_)
system.specialQuality: fiery heat, stomach like a furnace, too big to hurt with most weapons
system.moves:
- Chomp right through anything
- Swallow up someone whole
- Upend the terrain around it
- Belch cinders, start fires

When someone’s been swallowed by the Crombil, start using these moves against them:

- Batter them with debris, cinders (d6 damage)
- Make them fight for any sort of purchase or bearings
- Shove them further towards its furnace-like stomach
- Blister skin, burn lungs, singe hair (d8 damage)
